productDisplayName: Levis Men Work Western Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and green checked shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar with a denim collar stand. full sleeves and double buttoned cuffs, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with brand tab and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours and warm water Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron, do not iron on decorations Update your casual wardrobe with this comfortable woven checked shirt from levis. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6, chest 39" and shoulders 18"
